name: Core-world City Kid
description: Grew up in the stacked housing blocks of a major inner-system city, where the net was fast and the air was recycled. Spent more time behind screens than under open sky.

name: Belt Colony Brat
description: Raised on a hollowed-out rock somewhere in the main belt, where kids learned to patch suits before they learned to read. The colony ran on shift work and stubbornness.

name: Orbital Station Upbringing
description: Born and raised on a spinning station that never stopped creaking. Every wall was a conduit, every floor panel hid wiring, and someone was always fixing something.

name: Frontier Settlement
description: Grew up in a prefab settlement on a barely-surveyed world where the supply runs came late and everyone pulled double duty. You learned a bit of everything or you were dead weight.

name: Merchant Fleet Child
description: Spent childhood aboard a string of cargo haulers running freight between stations. The ships smelled like engine grease and recycled coffee, and the crew rotated every few months.

name: Research Outpost
description: Raised at a remote survey outpost staffed by a skeleton crew of tired scientists. The equipment was old, the grants were thin, and the nearest school was a two-month transit away.
